privileged_info_summary: The task operates on demodb, a synthetic travel agency database that is programmatically seeded with data based on real hotels and locations. The test case uses Hotel Artemide, which is a verified real 4-star boutique hotel in Rome, Italy located at Via Nazionale 22. The seed data for Hotel Artemide includes accurate name, city, country, and street address matching real-world facts about this hotel. The task targets the Hotels vertex class and requires refactoring flat address properties (Street, City, Country) into an embedded Location object with an Address property.
